title: BEM-706 no operator mailbox loop
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/handoff','governance/agreements/active','governance/agreements/final','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-20 | 22:47 (UTC+3)'
# 1) Replace previous operator-alert script with no-operator autoprocessor.
script=Path('scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py')
script.write_text(r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
STATE=Path("governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json")
HANDOFF=Path("governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md")
PENDING=Path("governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md")
ACTIVE_DIR=Path("governance/agreements/active")
FINAL_DIR=Path("governance/agreements/final")
MAILBOX_DIRS=[Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"), Path("governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor")]

def load_json(path):
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
    except Exception:
        return {}

def active_agreements():
    items=[]
    if ACTIVE_DIR.exists():
        for p in sorted(ACTIVE_DIR.glob("*.json")):
            data=load_json(p)
            if data:
                items.append({"path":str(p),"agreement_id":data.get("agreement_id"),"status":data.get("status"),"next_action":data.get("next_action")})
    return items

def scan_mailbox():
    hits=[]
    for d in MAILBOX_DIRS:
        if not d.exists():
            continue
        for p in sorted(d.glob("*")):
            if not p.is_file():
                continue
            txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
            upper=txt.upper()
            if "BEM-703" in txt or "MULTI-AGENT STRATEGY" in upper or "APPROVED" in upper or "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in upper or "BLOCKED" in upper:
                decision="MESSAGE"
                if "APPROVED" in upper:
                    decision="APPROVED"
                if "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in upper:
                    decision="CHANGE_REQUIRED"
                if "BLOCKED" in upper:
                    decision="BLOCKED"
                hits.append({"path":str(p),"decision":decision,"mtime":p.stat().st_mtime})
    return hits

now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
prev=load_json(STATE)
hits=scan_mailbox()
active=active_agreements()
known=set(prev.get("processed_paths",[]))
new_hits=[h for h in hits if h["path"] not in known]
status="no_new_claude_response"
if new_hits:
    status="new_claude_response_ready_for_gpt_processing"
    latest=new_hits[-1]
    HANDOFF.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    HANDOFF.write_text("# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE MAILBOX RESPONSE READY"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+SEP+"Оператор не участвует в обработке. GPT должен прочитать ответ Claude из repo/mailbox и довести согласование до результата."+SEP+SEP+"Файл: `"+latest["path"]+"`"+SEP+"Decision detected: "+latest["decision"]+SEP+SEP+"Действие: создать Codex task для фиксации результата, обновить active agreement, сформировать согласованный протокол или changes request."+SEP, encoding="utf-8")
    PENDING.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    PENDING.write_text("# Claude mailbox autoprocess pending"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Файл: "+latest["path"]+SEP+"Decision: "+latest["decision"]+SEP+"Operator relay is forbidden. GPT/Codex must process repo artifact directly."+SEP, encoding="utf-8")
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"claude_mailbox_autoprocess_state.v2_no_operator","status":status,"checked_at":now,"active_agreements":active,"hits":hits,"new_hits":new_hits,"processed_paths":sorted(set(list(known)+[h["path"] for h in new_hits])),"operator_notification":"disabled","operator_role":"none_in_routine_agreement_processing"},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":status,"new_hits":len(new_hits),"operator_notification":"disabled"},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
# 2) Patch curator-hourly-report to remove Telegram mailbox alert send step if present.
wf=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
wf_text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
old='''      - name: Send Claude mailbox alert if any\n        env:\n          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}\n          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}\n        run: |\n          if [ -s governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt ] && [ -n \"$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN\" ] && [ -n \"$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID\" ]; then\n            curl -sS -X POST \"https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage\" --data-urlencode \"chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}\" --data-urlencode text@governance/tmp/claude_mailbox_alert_message.txt >/dev/null\n          fi\n'''
if old in wf_text:
    wf_text=wf_text.replace(old,'')
wf_text=wf_text.replace('      - name: Check Claude mailbox alert\n        run: python3 scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py', '      - name: Check Claude mailbox autoprocess state\n        run: python3 scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py')
wf.write_text(wf_text)
# 3) Patch commit script to include handoff/pending and remove alert message artifact from required list if desired.
commit=Path('scripts/commit_curator_hourly_state.sh')
ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore') if commit.exists() else ''
if ct:
    if 'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md' not in ct:
        ct=ct.replace('  "governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json"', '  "governance/state/claude_mailbox_monitor_state.json"\n  "governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md"\n  "governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md"')
    commit.write_text(ct)
# 4) Protocol correction.
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/MANDATORY_CHATGPT_TASK_MONITOR_RULE.md')
oldp=protocol.read_text(errors='ignore') if protocol.exists() else ''
addition=sep+'## BEM-706 | No-operator mailbox processing rule'+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Оператор не является relay для ответов Claude. Если ChatGPT Task не подтверждён, repo-side fallback не должен слать оператору просьбу пересказать содержание. Fallback только фиксирует repo-state, handoff и pending autoprocess artifact. GPT/Codex читает mailbox напрямую из repo и доводит согласование до результата.'+sep
if 'BEM-706 | No-operator mailbox processing rule' not in oldp:
    protocol.write_text(oldp+addition)
# 5) State/report.
state={'schema_version':'remove_operator_from_mailbox_loop.v1','bem':'BEM-706','status':'no_operator_mailbox_loop_installed','operator_notification':'disabled_for_claude_mailbox_processing','workflow':'curator-hourly-report fallback only records repo state/handoff/pending','roadmap_implementation':'paused; not resumed','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem706_remove_operator_from_mailbox_loop.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem706_remove_operator_from_mailbox_loop.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-706 | Remove Operator From Mailbox Loop | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Operator removed from routine Claude mailbox response processing. Fallback now writes repo handoff and pending autoprocess artifacts only.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem706_remove_operator_from_mailbox_loop','status':'no_operator_mailbox_loop_installed','operator_notification':'disabled','blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem706_remove_operator_from_mailbox_loop.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-706 PASS: operator removed from Claude mailbox loop; repo handoff/pending artifacts used instead.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(script),str(wf),str(commit),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Removed operator from Claude mailbox response loop; fallback now records repo handoff/pending autoprocess artifacts instead of Telegram operator relay')
"""
No issue comments.
